title: Student commencement speakers have message of perseverance for fellow IU Bloomington graduates
summary_en: Jayvee Del Rosario, a public affairs student, will speak at the graduate commencement, set for 3 p.m. May 8 at Simon Skjodt Assembly Hall. Katherine Johnson, a business student, will speak at the u...
title_cn: 印第安纳大学伯明顿分校2026届毕业典礼学生代表将传递坚持不懈理念

title: IU earns AI Transformation Award at 2026 Mira Awards
summary_en: Indiana University won the AnalytiXIN AI Transformation Award at TechPoint’s 2026 Mira Awards, in recognition of its statewide leadership in generative AI.
title_cn: 印第安纳大学获2026年米拉奖AnalytiXIN人工智能转型奖

title: Largest undergraduate-managed real estate private equity fund raises additional $7.8 million
summary_en: Student fund managers with Sample Gates Management Inc. exceeded their initial $6 million goal for phase two, using a marketing deck they developed and distributed to prospective investors.
title_cn: 全球规模最大本科生管理房地产私募股权基金完成780万美元新增融资
